story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act XII: Market Doesn't Devour
**act** · shared · knowledge · plurality

The Market That Doesn't Devour. Privacy-preserving commerce, 7th capital.
> *The merchant who records every purchase owns more than goods—they own the customer. Private commerce is commerce where the customer owns themselves.*

story.title: Read the full text
story.text: the full prose of this act, in the Library.

- *narrates* → [[Privacy Economics]]
